app.name: Keygen
app.one_liner: Keygen is a fair source software licensing and distribution API, built for developers, by developers.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: Overview of licenses, activations, and distribution engines for the current account or environment.

rust_commands.name: migrate_database
rust_commands.purpose: Apply database migrations during upgrade as part of deployment workflow.

rust_commands.name: seed_data
rust_commands.purpose: Seed new data after database migrations during release rollout.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement basic license creation and validation endpoints
week 1: Run initial database migration with rake db:migrate
week 1: Set up Docker-based development environment using compose.yaml
acceptance_tests: After deploying v1.6.0, running `rake db:migrate` successfully applies all schema and data migrations without errors.
OCI engine correctly serves container images to licensed users according to entitlement rules.
